item.title: [Resolved] Problems with production database
item.description: After moving our production service to a new cluster, we’re seeing intermittent issues with connecting to the database. They are mostly manifesting in the dashboard. We need to decide next steps.
item.content: After moving our production service to a new cluster, we’re seeing intermittent issues with connecting to the database. They are mostly manifesting in the dashboard. We need to decide next steps.

item.title: [Resolved] Moving production Packit Service to a new cluster
item.description: We are going to move deployment of our production Packit Service to a new cluster. It should take about 1/2 an hour, during which the workers will be down and queries to API & dashboard won’t work properly because the database will be being migrated. Any requests submitted to the API meanwhile should, however, be fulfilled once the workers are up again.
item.content: We are going to move deployment of our production Packit Service to a new cluster. It should take about 1/2 an hour, during which the workers will be down and queries to API & dashboard won’t work properly because the database will be being migrated. Any requests submitted to the API meanwhile should, however, be fulfilled once the workers are up again.

item.title: [Resolved] PostgreSQL db upgrade
item.description: Upgrading our PostgreSQL database from version 10 to version 12.
item.content: Upgrading our PostgreSQL database from version 10 to version 12.

item.title: [Resolved] Dashboard - unable to connect
item.description: API was down and therefore Dashboard was not showing any Jobs and after some time a “unable to connect …” error was shown. Cause: Unknown Fix: After restarting the API, the Dashboard started to work OK.
item.content:
API was down and therefore Dashboard was not showing any Jobs and after some time a “unable to connect …” error was shown.

Cause: Unknown

Fix: After restarting the API, the Dashboard started to work OK.
